title: an enderman that is weird
description: Joke mod suggested by @asterope-here on pixilart.
body:
Welcome
-----------------
This is a joke mod that adds a powerful foe: The enderman that is weird! 

About the mob
-----------------
The weird enderman is a powerful creature that can spawn in groups of 1 - 5. These enderman are very fast and deal little damage, however in larger groups they can be a serious problem. Once defeated, they drop 2 ender pearls which makes for a great way to get ender pearls!
